response.global_analysis: 1. Dialogue Matching: Fully transcribed spoken English dialogue between the VTubers IRyS and Ouro Kronii. No external reference lyrics needed. 2. Pacing & Timings: Accurately timed each subtitle block to ensure clean pacing and synchronization with the spoken lines, including overlapping moments of laughter and commentary. 3. Translation: Provided original speech transcription and identical English translation since the original audio is in English.

subtitles.original: ...poor, you can't talk to it like that.
subtitles.english: ...poor, you can't talk to it like that.

subtitles.original: Why are you talking to a dead fly?
subtitles.english: Why are you talking to a dead fly?

subtitles.original: Well, you think I have anyone else to talk...
subtitles.english: Well, you think I have anyone else to talk...

subtitles.original: Oh, you don't, you don't, you don't deny that it's a dead fly!
subtitles.english: Oh, you don't, you don't, you don't deny that it's a dead fly!

subtitles.original: I mean, or you like... What are you?
subtitles.english: I mean, or you like... What are you?

subtitles.original: Like what's that, what's that little thing on your head?
subtitles.english: Like what's that, what's that little thing on your head?

subtitles.original: It's a, it's a, it's a...
subtitles.english: It's a, it's a, it's a...

subtitles.original: It's different from the halo on the dead fly, okay?!
subtitles.english: It's different from the halo on the dead fly, okay?!

subtitles.original: Maybe you have wings. What's the difference between you and that thing?
subtitles.english: Maybe you have wings. What's the difference between you and that thing?

subtitles.original: Do I look like a fly?!
subtitles.english: Do I look like a fly?!

subtitles.original: I'm not talking to you anymore.
subtitles.english: I'm not talking to you anymore.

subtitles.original: You can stay in there for eternity.
subtitles.english: You can stay in there for eternity.

subtitles.original: Hold on, beautiful woman. Come back here.
subtitles.english: Hold on, beautiful woman. Come back here.

subtitles.original: So, um, if you, if you happen to open this cage...
subtitles.english: So, um, if you, if you happen to open this cage...

subtitles.original: ...you know, you can put it on the tab.
subtitles.english: ...you know, you can put it on the tab.

subtitles.original: Uh... it can be something else.
subtitles.english: Uh... it can be something else.

subtitles.original: You're not lying to me, are you?
subtitles.english: You're not lying to me, are you?

subtitles.original: And something that comes with the price of free is...
subtitles.english: And something that comes with the price of free is...

subtitles.original: Maybe not a friend. I said my companionship.
subtitles.english: Maybe not a friend. I said my companionship.

subtitles.original: Hey, hey, come on. Okay, maybe for a day.
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, come on. Okay, maybe for a day.

subtitles.original: For a day, for a day.
subtitles.english: For a day, for a day.

subtitles.original: Now I look like a lonely ass!
subtitles.english: Now I look like a lonely ass!

subtitles.original: It's okay, it's okay if you're lonely.
subtitles.english: It's okay, it's okay if you're lonely.

subtitles.original: You know what, actually, I'm an angel.
subtitles.english: You know what, actually, I'm an angel.

subtitles.original: I am feeling awfully kind right now.
subtitles.english: I am feeling awfully kind right now.

subtitles.original: If you beg, I'll let you out.
subtitles.english: If you beg, I'll let you out.

subtitles.original: I'm gonna speak to your higher-ups about it.
subtitles.english: I'm gonna speak to your higher-ups about it.

subtitles.original: Well, you can't speak to my higher-ups if you're in this cage.
subtitles.english: Well, you can't speak to my higher-ups if you're in this cage.

subtitles.original: When I get out of here, you will, you will be fired.
subtitles.english: When I get out of here, you will, you will be fired.

subtitles.original: How are you gonna get out without me? That's the whole point!
subtitles.english: How are you gonna get out without me? That's the whole point!

subtitles.original: Do you want to take a bet? Do you want to take a gamble or do you want to just free me? You should just free me.
subtitles.english: Do you want to take a bet? Do you want to take a gamble or do you want to just free me? You should just free me.

subtitles.original: And then maybe I'll beg or whatever you want.
subtitles.english: And then maybe I'll beg or whatever you want.

subtitles.original: At the price of my companionship.
subtitles.english: At the price of my companionship.

subtitles.original: I'll free you for what? I'm here to let you out.
subtitles.english: I'll free you for what? I'm here to let you out.

subtitles.original: Hey, just let me out already!
subtitles.english: Hey, just let me out already!

subtitles.original: It's the magic word. It's just a magic word that starts with P.
subtitles.english: It's the magic word. It's just a magic word that starts with P.

subtitles.original: Just one please and it'll all be over, it would've all been over, okay?
subtitles.english: Just one please and it'll all be over, it would've all been over, okay?

subtitles.original: Okay, let's go. It's a big door. It's a big door.
subtitles.english: Okay, let's go. It's a big door. It's a big door.

subtitles.original: It's okay, I'm an angel. I can do this for my...
subtitles.english: It's okay, I'm an angel. I can do this for my...

subtitles.original: Beautiful friend, I will release thee!
subtitles.english: Beautiful friend, I will release thee!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, you did it!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, you did it!

subtitles.original: Uh, give me your hand, please. I need to get down from here.
subtitles.english: Uh, give me your hand, please. I need to get down from here.

subtitles.original: You can't even let yourself out? Okay.
subtitles.english: You can't even let yourself out? Okay.

subtitles.original: Okay, that was really... okay, you know what? I'll let it slide because you freed me.
subtitles.english: Okay, that was really... okay, you know what? I'll let it slide because you freed me.

subtitles.original: Yeah, that's how you show appreciation.
subtitles.english: Yeah, that's how you show appreciation.

subtitles.original: Yeah, well, I think we should celebrate!
subtitles.english: Yeah, well, I think we should celebrate!

subtitles.original: That would be so good! We're gonna like...
subtitles.english: That would be so good! We're gonna like...

subtitles.original: You're gonna treat me to something, right? You said...
subtitles.english: You're gonna treat me to something, right? You said...

subtitles.original: I'll treat you to something afterwards.
subtitles.english: I'll treat you to something afterwards.

subtitles.original: And then I'll put a good word in to your higher-ups, and it'll be wonderful.
subtitles.english: And then I'll put a good word in to your higher-ups, and it'll be wonderful.

subtitles.original: I don't even have higher-ups. You keep saying I have higher-ups. I don't.
subtitles.english: I don't even have higher-ups. You keep saying I have higher-ups. I don't.

subtitles.original: You know, you never know. Life is surprising.
subtitles.english: You know, you never know. Life is surprising.

subtitles.original: I mean, I'm sure you also have a boss, too.
subtitles.english: I mean, I'm sure you also have a boss, too.

subtitles.original: When did you get so strong? Ow!
subtitles.english: When did you get so strong? Ow!

subtitles.original: Oh, your hands are so big.
subtitles.english: Oh, your hands are so big.
